diagrams.title: Basic ISA Relationship Notation
diagrams.description: Shows how superclass and subclasses are connected using triangle notation in ER diagrams
diagrams.purpose: Learn standard ER notation for specialization/generalization

diagrams.title: Disjoint Constraint Example
diagrams.description: Shows exclusive membership where an entity belongs to only one subclass
diagrams.purpose: Understand disjoint/exclusive constraint and its notation

diagrams.title: Overlapping Constraint Example
diagrams.description: Shows multiple membership where an entity can belong to multiple subclasses
diagrams.purpose: Understand overlapping constraint where one person can be both student and teacher

diagrams.title: Complete Specialization Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows multi-level specialization with all constraint notations
diagrams.purpose: Visualize complex entity hierarchies with multiple inheritance levels

diagrams.title: Generalization Example
diagrams.description: Shows bottom-up generalization combining similar entities
diagrams.purpose: Understand generalization as reverse of specialization process
